features.evidence: the vivobook is powered by a 6 cell 96wh battery, and combined with the amd processor it s one of the best results i ve recorded, lasting for more than 10 and a half hours in the youtube playback test

5 gb ethernet port and the usb are also just the slower 5 gb variants for your next wireless game or file downloads the vivo book offers solid wi fi transfer rates and the webcam does its job without the best nor the worst image we came across this year so far in the maintenance department the six inja offers easy access to a pair of sodm and nvme slots and the wi fi card is slotted as well regarding inputs the vivo book continues to trend of an average but solid impression the keyboard offers a decent amount of travel a clean layout even though the number pad is a little squished to fit the chassis and a decent pressure point with average tactility the whole assembly does feel a little soft because of the plastic deck but overall you will get used to this one pretty quickly the large touchpad follows along the same line and did work with outer hitch during our testing and comes with the same touch style as for example the sbok pro 14 we tested a while back you probably cannot stand anymore to hear me go on and on on how much i love oled displays but please bear with me once more the 120 hz panel in this one looks simply gorgeous even though it comes with the same overall drawbacks common to all oled screens for now being pwm at 120 hz in this case and the relatively low average brightness contrast and color gar coverage are excellent though and factory calibration was spot on as well making the vivo book well suited for all sorts of photo or video editing shenanigans in typical asus fashion they also provide some additional color profiles for workflows that need finer control in this regard gaming on this panel is also a pure joy with the snappy refresh rate and insane and unmatched response times in the performance department the vivo book might not quite be able to keep up with other i9 39 adx equipped notebooks but when compared to the competition in similar form factures well you will be hardpressed to find a faster notebook with in this club class in our cpu performance rating the 16 in can easily outrun both the intel h and ryzen 7 cpus and only has to yield to proper desktop class type of high end gaming notebooks system performance measured with pc mark on the other hand reveals only average results even though the vi book is a very very snappy system and all testing and is well suited for all sorts of different use cases the drive used by asus also does not quite get the high end treatment and while transfer rates should be fast enough enough for almost anything you can come up with it s definitely also not the fastest we came across in 2023 the rtx 4680 pro 16x also delivers as expected and performs around the efficiency optimum for the mid range nvidia card at around 100 wats in both our content creation test as well as our 1080p gaming rating the via book is therefore offering not a class leading but still a very solid experience really making it a check of all trades for someone looking for reliable work and play companion please enjoy our benchmarks and if you want to get deeper into our test results please feel free to head on over to our written review i would also kindly ask you to hit that and subscribe button as well if you haven t already it really means a lot to us when properly pushed with combined cpu and gpu loads the vivo book can definitely make quite a bit of noise and you should definitely have your headset at the ready for those occasions but given that performance takes only a minimal hit when utilizing the excellent standard mode we simply can t think of too many situations where you would really need the marginal performance uplift given the very noisy drawbacks as always we took some noise samples for you so you can get an idea of what to expect and for much more insight into our stress test and temperature testing please once more check out our article on the website away from the wall the vivo book also offers nothing to write home about even though we think 6 and 1 half hours in our wi fi test with the screen set to 150 nits is still all right for the performance numbers you get in return all right folks so let s wrap this up for today the vivo book might not offer the same high end build quality and materials it s sbok or pro cousins but giv the reduced price point and still very potent core components that might exactly be the right compromise to be made with stella cpu performance and amazing screen lots of connection options and a solidly performing rtx 4060 you got all the right ingredients for a great multi purpose notebook that does not come with an as eye watering price tag as the before mentioned alternatives but please folks let me know what you think about this one in the comments below this shall be it for today thanks a ton for watching please leave your and sub on your way out my name is alex you have been fantastic and i cannot wait to see you all in the next one take care

this my dear greater friends is the asus vi book pro 16x and if you are into anything even remotely relating to content creation you should definitely keep this puppy in mind when shopping for your next notebook the vivo book series primarily covers the entry level to mid range segment in asus s lineup and the pro 16x might look it s made to fit within that particular bracket but at closer inspection it borrows quite a few things from its much more premium sand book and even pro out products and i would even say it does so in all the right places but without the crazy price texs of its more luxurious siblings so how about you get yourself some coffee and we see what this 16 in can deliver for all of your work productivity and entertainment needs before we get into the juicy details let s start with the specs shall we in the cpu department asus went allin and and stuffed inted top dog the i9 3980 hx in the vi book this absolute unit of a processor is aided by an rtx 4060 running at up to 140 wats at least on paper but more on that later and in addition you get 32 gigs of dd 5 4800 ram and a 1 tb ssd as with most of the vi book lineup the 16in comes with an oled and the panel in the pro 16x is most likely the same as we have already seen in the much more expensive studio book and sbook variants and by the way we are currently working on the sbook pro 16x review and you should definitely stay tuned for that one since the premium brother of the vivo book comes with a freaking 4080 this might also be the perfect opportunity to talk about the main and clearing differences between disa and the more higher invariance in asus s lineup which mostly comes down to build quality while both the s book and the studio book come with all metal or magnesium alloy chassis this this one right here is mainly made from plastic apart from the display lid it also does not look quite as classy as its siblings and while i personally do not mind the bright orange accent colors i am not so sure about the differently colored key kips bud quality is still very good and the used materials do not feel cheap at all chesse rigidity is also well within margin given the plastic deck and overall the vi book is a somewhat clean and subtle looking notebook for a wide range of applications that s that why the display l shows only minimal flex the hinges are not doing the best job from preventing screen wobble during intense typing or gaming sessions the port arrangement also does not leave a lot of room for criticism and on the left you get your power connector gigabit eanet a usba and a full size sd card reader with decent transfer rates on the opposite side you get an additional usba two thunderbolt 4s hdmi 2

5 gb ethernet port and the usb are also just the slower 5 gb variants for your next wireless game or file downloads the vivo book offers solid wi fi transfer rates and the webcam does its job without the best nor the worst image we came across this year so far in the maintenance department the six inja offers easy access to a pair of sodm and nvme slots and the wi fi card is slotted as well regarding inputs the vivo book continues to trend of an average but solid impression the keyboard offers a decent amount of travel a clean layout even though the number pad is a little squished to fit the chassis and a decent pressure point with average tactility the whole assembly does feel a little soft because of the plastic deck but overall you will get used to this one pretty quickly the large touchpad follows along the same line and did work with outer hitch during our testing and comes with the same touch style as for example the sbok pro 14 we tested a while back you probably cannot stand anymore to hear me go on and on on how much i love oled displays but please bear with me once more the 120 hz panel in this one looks simply gorgeous even though it comes with the same overall drawbacks common to all oled screens for now being pwm at 120 hz in this case and the relatively low average brightness contrast and color gar coverage are excellent though and factory calibration was spot on as well making the vivo book well suited for all sorts of photo or video editing shenanigans in typical asus fashion they also provide some additional color profiles for workflows that need finer control in this regard gaming on this panel is also a pure joy with the snappy refresh rate and insane and unmatched response times in the performance department the vivo book might not quite be able to keep up with other i9 39 adx equipped notebooks but when compared to the competition in similar form factures well you will be hardpressed to find a faster notebook with in this club class in our cpu performance rating the 16 in can easily outrun both the intel h and ryzen 7 cpus and only has to yield to proper desktop class type of high end gaming notebooks system performance measured with pc mark on the other hand reveals only average results even though the vi book is a very very snappy system and all testing and is well suited for all sorts of different use cases the drive used by asus also does not quite get the high end treatment and while transfer rates should be fast enough enough for almost anything you can come up with it s definitely also not the fastest we came across in 2023 the rtx 4680 pro 16x also delivers as expected and performs around the efficiency optimum for the mid range nvidia card at around 100 wats in both our content creation test as well as our 1080p gaming rating the via book is therefore offering not a class leading but still a very solid experience really making it a check of all trades for someone looking for reliable work and play companion please enjoy our benchmarks and if you want to get deeper into our test results please feel free to head on over to our written review i would also kindly ask you to hit that and subscribe button as well if you haven t already it really means a lot to us when properly pushed with combined cpu and gpu loads the vivo book can definitely make quite a bit of noise and you should definitely have your headset at the ready for those occasions but given that performance takes only a minimal hit when utilizing the excellent standard mode we simply can t think of too many situations where you would really need the marginal performance uplift given the very noisy drawbacks as always we took some noise samples for you so you can get an idea of what to expect and for much more insight into our stress test and temperature testing please once more check out our article on the website away from the wall the vivo book also offers nothing to write home about even though we think 6 and 1 half hours in our wi fi test with the screen set to 150 nits is still all right for the performance numbers you get in return all right folks so let s wrap this up for today the vivo book might not offer the same high end build quality and materials it s sbok or pro cousins but giv the reduced price point and still very potent core components that might exactly be the right compromise to be made with stella cpu performance and amazing screen lots of connection options and a solidly performing rtx 4060 you got all the right ingredients for a great multi purpose notebook that does not come with an as eye watering price tag as the before mentioned alternatives but please folks let me know what you think about this one in the comments below this shall be it for today thanks a ton for watching please leave your and sub on your way out my name is alex you have been fantastic and i cannot wait to see you all in the next one take care

review_summary: the vivobook is powered by a 6 cell 96wh battery, and combined with the amd processor it s one of the best results i ve recorded, lasting for more than 10 and a half hours in the youtube playback test 5 gb ethernet port and the usb are also just the slower 5 gb variants for your next wireless game or file downloads the vivo book offers solid wi fi transfer rates and the webcam does its job without the best nor the worst image we came across this year so far in the maintenance department the six inja offers easy access to a pair of sodm and nvme slots and the wi fi card is slotted as well regarding inputs the vivo book continues to trend of an average but solid impression the keyboard offers a decent amount of travel a clean layout even though the number pad is a little squished to fit the chassis and a decent pressure point with average tactility the whole assembly does feel a little soft because of the plastic deck but overall you will get used to this one pretty quickly the large touchpad follows along the same line and did work with outer hitch during our testing and comes with the same touch style as for example the sbok pro 14 we tested a while back you probably cannot stand anymore to hear me go on and on on how much i love oled displays but please bear with me once more the 120 hz panel in this one looks simply gorgeous even though it comes with the same overall drawbacks common to all oled screens for now being pwm at 120 hz in this case and the relatively low average brightness contrast and color gar coverage are excellent though and factory calibration was spot on as well making the vivo book well suited for all sorts of photo or video editing shenanigans in typical asus fashion they also provide some additional color profiles for workflows that need finer control in this regard gaming on this panel is also a pure joy with the snappy refresh rate and insane and unmatched response times in the performance department the vivo book might not quite be able to keep up with other i9 39 adx equipped notebooks but when compared to the competition in similar form factures well you will be hardpressed to find a faster notebook with in this club class in our cpu performance rating the 16 in can easily outrun both the intel h and ryzen 7 cpus and only has to yield to proper desktop class type of high end gaming notebooks system performance measured with pc mark on the other hand reveals only average results even though the vi book is a very very snappy system and all testing and is well suited for all sorts of different use cases the drive used by asus also does not quite get the high end treatment and while transfer rates should be fast enough enough for almost anything you can come up with it s definitely also not the fastest we came across in 2023 the rtx 4680 pro 16x also delivers as expected and performs around the efficiency optimum for the mid range nvidia card at around 100 wats in both our content creation test as well as our 1080p gaming rating the via book is therefore offering not a class leading but still a very solid experience really making it a check of all trades for someone looking for reliable work and play companion please enjoy our benchmarks and if you want to get deeper into our test results please feel free to head on over to our written review i would also kindly ask you to hit that and subscribe button as well if you haven t already it really means a lot to us when properly pushed with combined cpu and gpu loads the vivo book can definitely make quite a bit of noise and you should definitely have your headset at the ready for those occasions but given that performance takes only a minimal hit when utilizing the excellent standard mode we simply can t think of too many situations where you would really need the marginal performance uplift given the very noisy drawbacks as always we took some noise samples for you so you can get an idea of what to expect and for much more insight into our stress test and temperature testing please once more check out our article on the website away from the wall the vivo book also offers nothing to write home about even though we think 6 and 1 half hours in our wi fi test with the screen set to 150 nits is still all right for the performance numbers you get in return all right folks so let s wrap this up for today the vivo book might not offer the same high end build quality and materials it s sbok or pro cousins but giv the reduced price point and still very potent core components that might exactly be the right compromise to be made with stella cpu performance and amazing screen lots of connection options and a solidly performing rtx 4060 you got all the right ingredients for a great multi purpose notebook that does not come with an as eye watering price tag as the before mentioned alternatives but please folks let me know what you think about this one in the comments below this shall
